item.title: Julián Castro plans $250M endowment for Latino community groups across Southwest
item.description: Former housing secretary Julián Castro is announcing that the Latino Community Foundation will increase its assets and footprint

item.title: GOP challenger Steve Toth ousts Rep. Dan Crenshaw in Texas primary
item.description: U.S. Rep. Dan Crenshaw of Texas has lost his reelection bid in a GOP primary election to a conservative state lawmaker from Conroe

item.title: Winning numbers drawn in Tuesday’s Mega Millions
item.description: The winning numbers in Tuesday evening’s drawing of the "Mega Millions" game were: 07-21-53-54-62, Mega Ball: 16, Megaplier:

item.title: Rhode Island AG to unveil long-awaited report on Diocese of Providence clergy abuse
item.description: Rhode Island Attorney General Peter Neronha is releasing a report on child sexual abuse in the Diocese of Providence

item.title: Republican Tom Sell advances to primary runoff election in Texas' 19th Congressional District
item.description: Republican Tom Sell advances to primary runoff election in Texas' 19th Congressional District
